title: VACUUM corrupts database when MAIN and TEMP table names overlap.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE main_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value INT DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO temp_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
key_bug_features: MAIN and TEMP table names overlap during VACUUM
